markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 4
### Chapter 56. Funding of Ship Channel Improvements
##### § 56.004 — Revenue Bonds

The commission may issue revenue bonds for the purpose of providing money for the fund. Bond proceeds shall be deposited in the fund.

*Added by Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 1310 (H.B.3850), Sec. 3, eff. June 14, 2019.*

subsections.text: The commission may issue revenue bonds for the purpose of providing money for the fund. Bond proceeds shall be deposited in the fund.
